zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de St.Pol於大約1098年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯時，她的父親Hugues II de Rollancourt27歲，母親Jeanne de Blingel17歲。她和Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de St.Pol于大约1098年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯时，她的父亲Hugues II de Rollancourt27岁，母亲Jeanne de Blingel17岁。她和Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de St.Pol was born about 1098, in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Hugues II de Rollancourt, was 27 and her mother, Jeanne de Blingel, was 17. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de St.Pol est née environ 1098, à Artois, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues II de Rollancourt, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Blingel, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de St.Pol um 1098 in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II de Rollancourt 27 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Blingel 17. Sie hatte mit Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de St.Pol è nata il circa 1098 nel Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Hugues II de Rollancourt, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Blingel, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de St.Polが約1098年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスアルトイスで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Rollancourtは27歳，母Jeanne de Blingelは17歳であった。彼女はHugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdinとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de St.Pol(이)가 대략 1098년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 아토이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II de Rollancourt(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Blingel(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de St.Pol nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Artois, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Blingel, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de St.Pol родилась около 1098 г. в местности артоис, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues II de Rollancourt было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Blingel, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de St.Pol nació aproximadamente 1098, en Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Blingel, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin.
